summary: Completed comprehensive RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) system testing. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend User Management UI fully functional with role assignment dialog working correctly. Fixed 1 bug: VendorCreate model field mismatch (contact_person vs poc).

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing: demand_planner@factory.com, procurement officers with various emails. All test data prefixed with TEST_ was cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC system fully tested. All 10 roles seeded correctly: MASTER_ADMIN, DEMAND_PLANNER, TECH_OPS_ENGINEER, CPC_PLANNER, PROCUREMENT_OFFICER, BRANCH_OPS_USER, QUALITY_INSPECTOR, LOGISTICS_COORDINATOR, FINANCE_VIEWER, AUDITOR_READONLY. Permission enforcement working via @require_permission decorator. Frontend User Management page supports role assignment via dialog.

rbac_seeding.role_structure: PASS - All roles have id, code, name, is_active fields

permission_assignment.master_admin_permissions: PASS - Master Admin has MASTER_ADMIN role and full permissions

master_admin_access.create_sku: PASS - Master Admin can CREATE SKUs
master_admin_access.create_vendor: PASS - Master Admin can CREATE Vendors
master_admin_access.create_raw_material: PASS - Master Admin can CREATE Raw Materials

demand_planner_access.create_sku: PASS - Demand Planner can CREATE SKUs
demand_planner_access.cannot_delete_rm: PASS - Demand Planner CANNOT delete Raw Materials (403)
demand_planner_access.cannot_create_vendor: PASS - Demand Planner CANNOT create Vendors (403)

procurement_officer_access.create_vendor: PASS - Procurement Officer can CREATE Vendors
procurement_officer_access.cannot_delete_sku: PASS - Procurement Officer CANNOT delete SKUs (403)

role_assignment_api.assign_role: PASS - Admin can assign roles to users

role_removal.DELETE /api/users/{id}/roles/{code}: PASS - Admin can remove roles from users

frontend_user_management.page_loads: PASS - User Management page loads correctly
frontend_user_management.users_table: PASS - Shows users with RBAC Roles column
frontend_user_management.manage_roles_dialog: PASS - Opens with Current Roles and Available Roles sections
frontend_user_management.all_10_roles_in_dialog: PASS - All 10 roles visible with descriptions and Assign buttons

bugs_fixed.issue: VendorCreate model uses 'poc' field but route was using 'contact_person' causing AttributeError
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed create_vendor route to use input.poc and input.gst instead of input.contact_person and input.gst_number

console_warnings: Dashboard API returning 404 - likely missing dashboard endpoint (not related to RBAC)
